---
id: fetch-simple-application

description: "Fetch one application with its current variant, revision, and `data` merged."

import MethodEndpoint from "@theme/ApiExplorer/MethodEndpoint";
import ParamsDetails from "@theme/ParamsDetails";
import RequestSchema from "@theme/RequestSchema";
import StatusCodes from "@theme/StatusCodes";
import OperationTabs from "@theme/OperationTabs";
import TabItem from "@theme/TabItem";
import Heading from "@theme/Heading";
import Translate from "@docusaurus/Translate";

<Heading
  as={"h1"}
  className={"openapi__heading"}
  children={"Fetch Simple Application"}
>
</Heading>

<MethodEndpoint
  method={"get"}
  path={"/simple/applications/{application_id}"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>
  
</MethodEndpoint>



Fetch one application with its current variant, revision, and `data` merged.

The returned `data` includes the invocation `url`, the `parameters`
the revision was committed with, and the JSON `schemas` for inputs,
outputs, and parameters.

  id={"request"}
  as={"h2"}
  className={"openapi-tabs__heading"}
>

</Heading>
